ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot's arms mimicking the action of typing on a keyboard.  The movement will be deliberate and precise, reflecting the focused nature of typing. The sequence will use both arms in a synchronized, alternating motion, with the wrists slightly bent to simulate finger movements.  We'll start with the arms slightly raised, then alternate between left and right arm movements, and end with the arms returning to a neutral position.  The focus will be on the controlled, rhythmic movement of the hands.

frames.beat: arms hover, ready to begin typing
left hand reaches for a key, wrist bent
right hand strikes a key, left arm rests
both arms return to a resting typing pose
